/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -DOPENFHE_VERSION=1.4.0 -Wno-parentheses -O3 -DMATHBACKEND=4 -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/fft-ckks-encoding.dir/src/fft-ckks-encoding.cpp.o -o ../bin/benchmark/fft-ckks-encoding   -L/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/xilinx/xrt/lib:/home/CONNECT/xmeng027/work/HKS-Accelerator-hanxu/openfhe/bulid/lib ../lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.4.0 ../lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.4.0 ../lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.4.0 ../lib/libbenchmark.a -fopenmp -ldl /opt/xilinx/xrt/lib/libxrt_coreutil.so -luuid -lpthread -lrt
